home.title: Furqan
home.tagline: Every word is a trust, every verse a journey — annotate, reflect, and perfect your memorization of the Noble Quran, guided step by step alongside your teacher.

search.placeholder: Search surah by name or number

notFound.title: 404 - Page Not Found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.

mushaf.hubTagline: Let others read and mark your mushaf, or open one shared with you.
mushaf.signedOut: Sign in to share your mushaf or open one shared with you.

generate.title: Share my mushaf
generate.description: Generate a one-time code and share it. Whoever enters it can view and edit the marks on your mushaf. Each code works once.
generate.error: Couldn't generate a code. Try again.

redeem.title: Access someone's mushaf
redeem.description: Enter a code someone shared with you to view and edit their mushaf.
redeem.success: Access granted — see the list below.

accessible.title: Mushafs I can access
accessible.description: Mushafs others have shared with you.

viewers.title: People who can access my mushaf
viewers.description: Remove anyone to instantly cut off their access.
viewers.empty: No one has access to your mushaf.
